meta.title: ReelGet — Free Video Downloader for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube & More
meta.description: Download videos from Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, Twitter/X and 10+ platforms — free, instant, no login. Paste any video URL to save it in HD. TikTok videos saved without watermark.

hero.title: Instagram & Facebook Downloader
hero.subtitle: Download Instagram Reels, Facebook Videos & YouTube clips instantly. Free, fast, no app required.
hero.placeholder: Paste your Instagram, TikTok, Facebook or YouTube link...

howto.title: How to Download Videos
howto.step1_desc: Open Instagram, YouTube or Facebook and copy the video link.
howto.step2_desc: Paste the link in the box above and click the Download button.
howto.step3_desc: Choose your quality and save the video to your device.

result.title: Your Video is Ready!
result.error: Could not find the video. Please check the link and try again.
result.invalid_url: Please enter a valid Instagram, TikTok, Facebook or YouTube link.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, completely free. No registration or app required.
faq.a2: Instagram (Reels, Posts, Stories), YouTube (Videos, Shorts), and Facebook (Videos, Reels).
faq.a3: Yes. We do not store your links or videos. Everything is processed in real time.
faq.a4: No. Only public videos can be downloaded.
